_comment: Placeholder ComfyUI workflow for Wan2.1 image-to-video (I2V). Export your Wan I2V workflow from ComfyUI in API format and replace this file. Update input_mappings in config/wan_i2v.json so node ids match: image (LoadImage), positive/negative prompt, num_frames/width/height (sampler/length node), and the SaveVideo/VHS output node. The client reads the first video output (mp4/webm) from /history.
